conflict: Vautrin demands immediate intelligence, the contact handoff is disrupted by an early arrest, and Clemence tests every seam in Elise's cover story.
consequence: Elise secures provisional shelter only by sacrificing the courier who should have vouched for her, tying her infiltration to a personal betrayal.
must_land_beats: Vautrin leverages Elise's mother's asylum bills to lock her into the mission.
Elise adopts the alias Jeanne Morel and improvises when the handoff goes wrong.
Clemence brings Elise underground because the refuge suddenly needs labor and secrecy more than certainty.
objective: Gain entry to the quarry refuge under the alias Jeanne Morel before the police dragnet closes.
